name: Palakova
steps: Boil the milk in a wide, heavy kadai on medium heat.
Stir continuously, scraping the sides and bottom, as the milk reduces and thickens.
When it reaches a thick, grainy consistency, add the sugar — it loosens again.
Keep stirring until the kova leaves the sides of the kadai in one mass.
Finish with ghee and cardamom, cool slightly and serve — the famous milk sweet of Andhra.
